series_metadata.series_description: Results of criminal records checks conducted by Ohio BCI&I and the FBI for dental/dental hygiene license and dental/dental hygiene limited teaching license applicants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For "No Records" identified criminal background checks, document in the licensure file that the information was received and then immediately dispose of the record. For criminal background checks with identified criminal records, contact the court of jurisdiction to obtain certified records, then shred Criminal Background Check., Paper: Shred
